metaValues.discovery-prospects:general-curious:defi: Visitor entering the Cuure ecosystem with no specific purchase intent, driven by curiosity or brand discovery.
metaValues.discovery-prospects:need-driven:definiti: Visitor arriving with an identified health need, looking for a specific solution.
metaValues.discovery-prospects:general-health:defin: Visitor motivated by an overall health approach, with no specific product in mind.
metaValues.discovery-prospects:product-comparator:d: Already-informed visitor comparing specific products before making a decision.
metaValues.discovery-prospects:product-innovation:d: Visitor attracted by an innovative or newly launched Cuure product.
metaValues.discovery-returning:crm-led:definition: Visitor returning after a CRM communication (email, SMS) featuring a promotional offer.
metaValues.discovery-returning:reviews-seekers:defi: Visitor returning to read customer reviews before (re)ordering.
metaValues.discovery-returning:information-seekers:: Visitor returning to find additional information (ingredients, usage, FAQ…).
metaValues.conversion:mycuure:definition: Customer going through the personalised MyCuure recommendation flow to find the right supplements.
metaValues.conversion:mycuure:source:
Home Page (banner, solutions) /
Burger Menu / 
Catalog
metaValues.conversion:fs3b:definition: Customer interested in the FS-3B product, following its dedicated conversion funnel.
metaValues.conversion:ma05:definition: Customer interested in the MA-05 product, following its dedicated funnel.
metaValues.conversion:onely:definition: Customer interested in the onely product, following its specific conversion path.
metaValues.conversion:essentials:definition: Customer looking to complete their order with essential products via the Multi-range path.
metaValues.conversion-multi-range:multi-range:defin: Customer browsing the catalog to build an order with multiple different products.
metaValues.post-purchase-mycuure:box:definition: Customer who ordered a personalised MyCuure box, going through the post-purchase experience (delivery, unboxing, app onboarding).
metaValues.post-purchase-mycuure:reload:definition: Customer who ordered a MyCuure Reload (refill of their box), following the same post-purchase flow.
metaValues.post-purchase-fs3b:bottle:definition: Customer who ordered a 1-month FS-3B bottle, going through the post-purchase flow.
metaValues.post-purchase-fs3b:pack:definition: Customer who ordered a 3-month FS-3B pack, same post-purchase flow.
metaValues.post-purchase-fs3b:refill:definition: Customer who ordered a 1-month FS-3B refill.
metaValues.repurchase-otp:same-products-refiller:de: OTP customer looking to reorder the exact same products as before.
metaValues.repurchase-otp:upseller:definition: OTP customer wanting to try out a new product.
metaValues.repurchase-otp:change-seekers:definition: OTP customer wanting to explore new products or update their routine.
metaValues.repurchase-otp:convinced-to-subscription: OTP customer converted to a subscription
metaValues.repurchase-active-subscriber:repeat-auto: Active subscriber whose order renews automatically without any action needed.
metaValues.repurchase-active-subscriber:upseller:de: Active subscriber presented with an upsell offer at renewal time.
metaValues.repurchase-active-subscriber:change-seek: Active subscriber wanting to change their product selection.
metaValues.repurchase-active-subscriber:subscriptio: Active subscriber looking to postpone their next delivery date.
metaValues.repurchase-active-subscriber:pause-subsc: Active subscriber temporarily pausing their subscription.
metaValues.repurchase-active-subscriber:order-cance: Active subscriber cancelling an upcoming order.
metaValues.repurchase-paused-subscriber:reactivate-: Paused subscriber reactivating their subscription with the same products as before.
Paused subscriber reactivating with a proposed upsell added to the cart.
Paused subscriber reactivating with a new product selection.
metaValues.engagement-loyalty:intaker:definition: Customer newly enrolled in the loyalty program, discovering its benefits.
metaValues.engagement-loyalty:status-lover:definiti: Customer attached to their loyalty status and motivated by tier progression.
metaValues.engagement-loyalty:referrer:definition: Customer actively referring new customers through the referral program.
metaValues.engagement-loyalty:rewards-seeker:defini: Customer actively looking to earn or redeem their loyalty rewards.
metaValues.engagement-loyalty:coupon-chaser:definit: Customer primarily motivated by coupons and discounts from the loyalty program.
